title: How People Are Using AI for Health

mentions.context_snippet: LM Arena has raised $150 million at a $1.7 billion valuation. This is the second venture round for the model benchmarking company since they decided to become a commercial startup.

In September, LM Arena launched their first commercial service called AI Evaluations, which allows enterprises, AI labs, and developers to hire LM Arena to perform bespoke evaluations using their community of users.

mentions.quoted_text: AI Strategy Compass is a power tool for anyone who is responsible for AI adoption or AI transformation inside their companies.
mentions.context_snippet: There is a new option called AI Strategy Compass, join the beta. ... It's going to allow you to do a lot of the things that we do at Superintelligent, but in a much more automated, self-managed way.

mentions.quoted_text: ChatGPT has introduced ChatGPT Health, ... a dedicated health experience inside the application.
mentions.context_snippet: ChatGPT has introduced ChatGPT Health, and this is both surprising and not surprising all at once. ... It is a dedicated health experience inside the application.

facts.fact_value: dedicated health experience inside ChatGPT app

mentions.quoted_text: OpenAI released a report called AI as a Healthcare Ally, how Americans are navigating the system with ChatGPT.
mentions.context_snippet: Earlier in the week, OpenAI released a report called AI as a Healthcare Ally, how Americans are navigating the system with ChatGPT.

mentions.mention_text: What AI Can Do for a Broken System
mentions.canonical_name: What AI Can Do for a Broken System
mentions.quoted_text: She expanded on this in a larger blog post called What AI Can Do for a Broken System.
mentions.context_snippet: OpenAI's CEO of Applications Fiji Simo wrote, The launch of ChatGPT Health is really personal for me. She expanded on this in a larger blog post called What AI Can Do for a Broken System.

notes: Mentions include organizations, software products, persons, reports, and blog posts central to the episode's claims.
URLs are included only when explicitly mentioned or clearly inferable from context.
Sentiment labels are based on the tone of the mention in context.
No invented URLs were created; source_url is null when unknown.
Conservative approach taken to avoid over-inclusion.
